class.name: EFSWListener
class.brief_description: A wrapper class for FileWatchListener in [url=https://github.com/SpartanJ/efsw/]efsw[/url].
class.description: Used to wrap [Callable]s as callback functions for handling file actions. The parameter list for these [Callable]s must be strictly defined, see [method set_file_action_handler] and [method set_missed_file_actions_handler] for details.

method.name: set_file_action_handler
set_missed_file_actions_handler
method.description: Sets the [Callable] to handle the behavior when file actions are lost due to the file system monitoring queue overflows. [param handler] needs to accept the following arguments in order: [code skip-lint]int[/code]: The watch ID of the directory manually added by [method EFSWWatcher.add_watch]; [code skip-lint]String[/code]: The path of the watched directory. [b]Note:[/b] This callback will be called in a separate thread, so please ensure thread safety.

constants.constant: A file or directory is created or moved in from outside the scope.
A file or directory is deleted or moved out of scope.
A file or directory is modified.
A file or directory is moved.
